description: Anchor lens for the Greek concept of episteme (ἐπιστήμη) — systematic, propositional, and demonstrable knowledge. The most formal of the Greek knowledge-type distinctions. Grounds in logos.episteme.systematic via grc-core-cog-021 (cross_lang.logos.episteme.en_collapse edge, weight 0.72; ADR-0073a: 'systematic_to_english_collapse'). Cognitive mode: systematic-knowledge. Triad with grc_epignosis_v1 (experiential) and grc_synesis_v1 (comprehension-insight).
